mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`account`( user_id, account_number, account_type, balance, account_password, status, password_fail_count, account_alias, created_at, last_transaction_at) VALUES (#{account.userId}, #{account.accountNumber}, #{account.accountType}, #{account.balance}, #{account.accountPassword}, #{account.status}, #{account.passwordFailCount}, #{account.accountAlias}, #{account.createdAt}, #{account.lastTransactionAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT `account_id` AS `accountId`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `account_number` AS `accountNumber`, `account_type` AS `accountType`, `balance` AS `balance`, `account_password` AS `accountPassword`, `status` AS `status`, `password_fail_count` AS `passwordFailCount`, `account_alias` AS `accountAlias`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `last_transaction_at` AS `lastTransactionAt` FROM `bank`.`account` WHERE `account_id` = #{id}

SELECT `account_id` AS `accountId`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `account_number` AS `accountNumber`, `account_type` AS `accountType`, `balance` AS `balance`, `account_password` AS `accountPassword`, `status` AS `status`, `password_fail_count` AS `passwordFailCount`, `account_alias` AS `accountAlias`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `last_transaction_at` AS `lastTransactionAt` FROM `bank`.`account` WHERE `account_number` = #{accountNumber}

SELECT `account_id` AS `accountId`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `account_number` AS `accountNumber`, `account_type` AS `accountType`, `balance` AS `balance`, `account_password` AS `accountPassword`, `status` AS `status`, `password_fail_count` AS `passwordFailCount`, `account_alias` AS `accountAlias`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `last_transaction_at` AS `lastTransactionAt` FROM `bank`.`account` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `created_at` DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`account` SET balance = #{balance}, last_transaction_at = NOW() WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
